APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Jan-12-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
Vincent Gannuscio, Esq.DEMIDCHIK LAW FIRM, P.C., Tel: (415) 960-3333 for plaintiff.

A hearing is required. The matter was heard and discussed. Upon conclusion of the proceedings rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF YAN WU, APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is taken under submission.

Proposed order (Judicial Council Form AT-140) submitted.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
